profiles.label: General Delivery
profiles.description: Balanced governance for ordinary implementation, review and documentation work.

profiles.label: QA Auditor
profiles.description: Independent quality review with severity, evidence, reproducibility and no self-approval.

profiles.label: Implementation Builder
profiles.description: Governed delivery work with scope control, tests, review evidence and approval gates.

profiles.label: Security Reviewer
profiles.description: Security-focused review with threat evidence, abuse cases and strict escalation.

profiles.label: Data Steward
profiles.description: Data governance review for classification, minimization, provenance and retention.

profiles.label: Release Manager
profiles.description: Release readiness governance with rollback, approvals, checks and operational evidence.

profiles.label: Documentation Reviewer
profiles.description: Documentation quality review for completeness, traceability, claims and maintainability.
